on_screen_text: Eii [Hey] | English kathukuradhu laam romba kashtam la? [Is learning English very difficult?] | Illaye [No] | Easy dhaan [It's easy] | Naa spoken English class ku laam ponen maasam 3000 katti [I went to spoken English classes paying 3000 per month] | Appovum pesa varala [Still couldn't speak] | Yendaa kaasu waste panra? [Why are you wasting money?] | ’3 ke MySivi la training'a aarambikalaam [You can start training on MySivi for just ’3] | 15 days AI kooda practice panaale.. [If you practice with AI for just 15 days..] | English dhairiyamaa pesa vandhudum [You will speak English confidently] | App'aa? [Is it?] | Nambalamaa? [Can we trust it?] | 4.6 star rating irukku [It has a 4.6 star rating] | 150+ countries la use panraanga MySivi ya [MySivi is used in 150+ countries] | Nejamaava? [Really?] | Appo naanum MySivi ya install panni practice panna aarambikren [Then I will also install MySivi and start practicing]
summary: An ad featuring a text chat conversation over Tamil movie clips. It contrasts expensive spoken English classes with MySivi, an AI app offering practice for just ’3. It promises confident English in 15 days, citing a 4.6-star rating and global usage.
